terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: This platform ("Second-hand Marketplace") is an online trading platform connecting buyers and sellers. By using this platform, you agree to comply with these terms.
terms.section2Content:
You agree to:
• Provide accurate and truthful personal information
• Not upload illegal, harassing, or infringing content
• Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
• Be responsible for your account activities
terms.section3Content:
Sellers agree to:
• Only upload photos you have taken or own the copyright to
• Accurately describe product condition and functionality
• Not publish false or misleading information
• Comply with all product safety regulations
terms.section4Content:
• Buyers and sellers should communicate through platform messages
• Recommend meeting in safe public places for in-person transactions
• Recommend using secure payment methods
• Cash on delivery
• Reject advance transfers or wire transfers
terms.section5Content:
The platform is not responsible for:
• Transaction disputes between buyers and sellers
• Product quality or authenticity issues
• Loss or damage of personal items
• Fraud or deceptive practices
• Disputes between users
terms.section6Content:
The platform reserves the right to:
• Terminate user accounts that violate these terms
• Remove violating content
• Prohibit users from re-registering
• Cooperate with law enforcement investigations
terms.section7Content: The platform may modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform indicates your agreement to the modified terms.
terms.contactUs: If you have any questions, please contact our customer service team.

footer.aboutDescription: Second-hand Marketplace is an online trading platform connecting buyers and sellers, committed to promoting a circular economy.
footer.socialDescription: Follow us on social media for the latest updates.

policy.title: Trading Policy and Disclaimer
policy.section1Content1: This website (Marketplace Second-hand Trading Platform) is a person-to-person (C2C) trading platform. Our role is limited to providing a trading venue where buyers and sellers can connect and conduct product transactions.
policy.section1Content2: This website does not participate in any trading process, including but not limited to product inspection, quality assurance, payment processing, or after-sales service.
policy.section2Content1: All transactions on the platform are personal actions between buyers and sellers. When creating an order, buyers and sellers indicate that they fully understand the nature of the transaction and are willing to assume corresponding responsibilities.
policy.section2Content2: This website assumes no responsibility for any commitments, agreements, or transaction results between the parties.
policy.section3Bold: This website does not involve any payment processing.
policy.section3Content1: All payment methods (cash, transfer, third-party payment, etc.) are negotiated and decided by the buyer and seller themselves.
policy.section3Content2: This website does not provide any payment, escrow, or refund services. Buyers and sellers must ensure transaction security themselves.
policy.section3Content3: If payment disputes occur, this website is not responsible for mediation or handling.
policy.section4Bold: Product quality, condition, and authenticity are the responsibility of the seller.
policy.section4Content1: Buyers should fully understand product information before trading and communicate with the seller.
policy.section4Content2: This website makes no warranty or guarantee regarding product quality, authenticity, completeness, or legality.
policy.section4Content3: If product disputes occur (such as counterfeits, damage, or description mismatch), buyers and sellers should resolve them through mutual negotiation.
policy.section5Bold: All after-sales services (returns, exchanges, repairs, etc.) are provided by the seller.
policy.section5Content1: This website does not provide any after-sales support or protection.
policy.section5Content2: Buyers should confirm the seller's after-sales policy before purchasing.
policy.section6Bold: Buyers and sellers should take measures to ensure transaction safety.
policy.section6Item1: Conduct transactions in safe public places
policy.section6Item5: Be alert to fraud and suspicious transactions
policy.section6Content: This website is not responsible for any safety issues that occur during the transaction process (such as fraud, robbery, or loss).
policy.section7Bold: This website does not provide any dispute resolution or mediation services.
policy.section7Content1: If trading disputes occur, buyers and sellers should resolve them through the following methods:
policy.section7Content2: This website assumes no legal responsibility for any disputes.
policy.section8Content: This website is not responsible for any of the following under any circumstances:
policy.section8Item1: Any loss or damage during the transaction process
policy.section8Item6: Any loss resulting from the use of this platform
policy.section9Item1: Provide true and accurate personal information
policy.section9Item2: Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
policy.section9Item3: Not post false, misleading, or illegal product information
policy.section9Item4: Not engage in fraud, harassment, or other misconduct
policy.section10Content1: This website reserves the right to modify this policy at any time. Users should regularly check this page for the latest policy.
policy.section10Content2: Continued use of this platform indicates the user's agreement to the latest policy terms.
policy.importantContent1: Before using this platform for any transaction, please ensure that you have fully understood and agreed to all the above terms.
policy.importantContent2: If you have any questions about this policy, please contact the platform administrator before conducting any transactions.
